name: Dead Moor Behind the Crooked Cross
description:
By passing a strange Crooked Cross, you reach a stinky and cold Moor.  The
stench is not overwhelmed only by the number of dead bodies throwed at the
moor.  It is quite a chaotic place, this is suposed to be the donation of the
clan...  The distribution of the equipment is really simple, while the dead
bodies, with the equipment roots, maggots and vermins eat them, leaving only
the bones, which are consumed by the acid water of the moor.
